description: Sandal-style heels from catwalk for the desi diva. These shoes are synonymous with good taste and practicality with their durable straps and stylish wedge-heels. Wear this with denims, or skirts or dresses. Heel: 3" Upper Synthetic leather criss-crossing straps across the forefoot and midfoot Ankle strap has a buckle closure Leather footbed with a foot patch Outsole TPR outsole with heels and horizontal grooves on the forefoot for grip Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
